list.vod_content: The teaser unfolds in whatâ€™s described as â€œhauntingly atmospheric backwaters,â€‌ offering glimpses of a narrative that oscillates between romance and pulse-pounding suspense. The film is positioned as an adrenaline-charged experience that seamlessly blends love, primal terror, and survival.
